name: Walnut Barley
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Walnut, chopped (or mixed almonds and hazelnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the barley under warm running water.
2. Drain the barley.
3. In a medium-sized saucepan, bring the water to a boil.
4. Gradually add the barley to the boiling water.
5. Cover and cook for 20 to 25 minutes, or until tender.
6. Return the cooked barley to the saucepan with celery, nuts (walnut, almond, and/or hazelnut), salt, and pepper.
7. Heat through until all ingredients are well combined.
8. Garnish with parsley.
Food Exchange per serving: 2 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 187; CHO: 0mg; CAR: PRO: 5g; SOD: 59mg; FAT: 7g
